name: ComfyUI-LTX-FDG
description: Frequency-Decoupled Guidance (FDG) for ComfyUI and ComfyUI-LTXVideo
author: Based on paper by Sadat et al. (arXiv:2506.19713)

nodes.name: FDGParameters
nodes.description: Configure Frequency-Decoupled Guidance parameters for LTXV/LTXAV models

features: Separate guidance scales for low and high frequency components
Better quality at low CFG scales
Support for both video-only (LTXV) and video+audio (LTXAV) models
